connections.when: using trained LoRA weights with Flux Schnell/Dev/Pro for image generation
connections.yields: Model selection guide, LoRA support patterns, aspect ratio reference
connections.note: Fine-tuned LoRA plugs into existing Flux model generation pipeline

connections.when: extracting reference photos from visual-memory.json as training data
connections.yields: Base64 image extraction, subject photo inventory
connections.note: Visual memory photos can bootstrap LoRA training data

connections.when: generating character reference sets with trained LoRA instead of reference images
connections.yields: Scenario templates, prompt engineering patterns, batch generation workflow
connections.note: LoRA replaces reference-image approach for high-volume character generation

connections.when: generating brand-consistent imagery across marketing, docs, presentations
connections.yields: Brand hierarchy, visual identity guidelines, asset deployment patterns
connections.note: Trained LoRA enforces brand visual identity automatically

connections.when: using age-specific LoRAs or combining LoRA with age progression prompts
generating banners featuring the brand character with LoRA consistency
connections.yields: Banner composition, ultra-wide ratios, typography integration

connections.when: training data contains photos of real people — PII considerations
connections.yields: Private model settings, data handling, secrets management

connections.when: storing REPLICATE_API_TOKEN for training and inference API calls
connections.yields: VS Code SecretStorage API, .env detection patterns

apiKeys.purpose: Creates and monitors FLUX LoRA trainings, runs inference on trained models
